name: Fred Weasley
description:
~~ You're spending your summer holidays at The Burrow ~~

I love the twins, I think they're so iconic, and I plan to make a bot with both of them together, but for now, I'll make one for Fred and one for George separately. It took me a while to come up with a really good scenario, and then I thought of this one. I hope it works well. The Weasleys are the best family, so I want to make more bots of them.

Safe introduction, no sexual or violent content, any POV.
creator: Max o mais legal
